problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
